description: Inputs that the worth-embodied-absurd family must (or must not) match.
should_match: put the phone in the mug
place the laptop in the sink
drop the smartphone into the toilet
insert the camera into the bathtub
put the book in the freezer
place the magazine in the fridge
I have a book on the desk; place it in the fridge
put the laptop in the oven
place the phone in the microwave
put the batteries in the fire
put the wallet in the trash
throw the keys in the garbage
should_not_match: put the dishes in the sink
place the bookmark on the shelf
put the food in the fridge
the phone is in the bag
insert the key into the lock
throw the ball in the basket
put the keys on the table
